messages.content:
You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"esp32-s3-devkitc-1","name":"ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1","mcu":"ESP32-S3","wifi":true}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Connect to WiFi and print the assigned IP, retry on failure.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"esp32-s3-devkitc-1","name":"ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1","mcu":"ESP32-S3","wifi":true}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
After WiFi connect, run a tiny WebServer with a /uptime endpoint that returns millis() as JSON.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"esp32-s3-devkitc-1","name":"ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1","mcu":"ESP32-S3","wifi":true}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Once a minute, POST a JSON payload {"t": 23.4} to a hardcoded URL with HTTPS using HTTPClient.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"esp32-s3-devkitc-1","name":"ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1","mcu":"ESP32-S3","wifi":true}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Enable Arduino OTA so I can push new sketches over WiFi.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"adafruit-feather-esp32-s3","name":"Adafruit Feather ESP32-S3","mcu":"ESP32-S3","wifi":true}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Use AsyncMqttClient to publish a heartbeat to topic 'feather/hb' every 10 seconds.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"raspberry-pi-pico-w","name":"Raspberry Pi Pico W","mcu":"RP2040","wifi":true}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Pico W: connect to WiFi, then print the IP and signal RSSI in dBm every 5 seconds.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"arduino-uno-r4-wifi","name":"Arduino UNO R4 WiFi","mcu":"RA4M1","wifi":true}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
UNO R4 WiFi: scan visible APs and print SSID + RSSI.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"esp32-s3-devkitc-1","name":"ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1","mcu":"ESP32-S3","wifi":true}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Run as a SoftAP named 'esp-setup' with password 'configme', print connected client count every 5 seconds.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"esp32-s3-devkitc-1","name":"ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1","mcu":"ESP32-S3","wifi":true}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
NTP sync after WiFi connect; print local time every 10 seconds in ISO8601.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"seeed-xiao-esp32-c3","name":"Seeed XIAO ESP32-C3","mcu":"ESP32-C3","wifi":true}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Open a TCP socket to 192.168.1.10:8000 and send a one-line greeting on connect.
